div.style: height: auto;

position: absolute; left: 6px; top: 4px; font-size: 10px; line-height: 1; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 4px 0px 0px; max-width: 60%; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; background: transparent; z-index: 1; --darkreader-inline-bgimage: initial; --darkreader-inline-bgcolor: transparent;
transform-origin: left bottom; transform: scaleY(0.5); will-change: transform;
width: 42%;
position: absolute; right: 6px; top: 2px; transform-origin: right top; transform: scale(0.3333, 0.5); will-change: transform; z-index: 1;
